overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest trail at night. Ground fog obscures the distant path between dense trees and tall grass. The footage appears to be from a survival horror or exploration video game with atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with ground fog

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path through the dark forest toward the fog-shrouded distance

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through tall grass
dense tall grass and vegetation lining the left side of the path
white-barked trees with sparse foliage lining the right side
low-lying white fog obscuring the forest floor in the distance
dark evergreen trees visible through the gaps in the left vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail cutting through a dense forest at night. Tall grass flanks the left side while birch trees line the right. Ground fog hangs in the distance, partially obscuring the path ahead, creating an atmospheric and slightly ominous mood typical of horror game environments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that maintains a tense, atmospheric mood. It begins by advancing steadily along a narrow dirt path, flanked by tall grass on the left and a line of birch trees on the right. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the surrounding foliage closes in, heightening the sense of isolation. The scene then focuses on the path ahead, where thick ground fog begins to settle and partially obscure the trail, finally enveloping the distance in an ominous, hazy shroud.
